## Fitness Routine (Week 3 - Feb 10, 2026 onwards)

**Equipment:** 10lb dumbbells (upgraded from 5lb)
**Format:** 2 sets × 8 reps | 60-90s rest between sets

### Today's Workout:
1. Goblet Squats — 2 × 8 (one 10lb dumbbell at chest)
2. Dumbbell Bench Press — 2 × 8 (both 10lb dumbbells)
3. Bent-Over Rows — 2 × 8 (one 10lb per hand)
4. Overhead Press — 2 × 8 (both 10lb dumbbells)
5. Romanian Deadlifts — 2 × 8 (both 10lb dumbbells)
6. Plank Hold — 2 × 30 seconds

**Schedule:** Alternating — Weights → Yoga (30min yin) → Weights → Yoga
**Progress:** Weeks 1-2 @ 5lb (2×10), Week 3+ @ 10lb (2×8) — taking it slow for lower back

**Source:** `~/Documents/Claude Projects/HEALTH/fitness-log.md`
